goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 09:45'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should leave on monday
The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 09:45
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and arrival time
